description: A thick leather-bound grimoire with iron clasps
id-description: A spell book of great repute.

description: A dark book with inked tendril patterns
id-description: A spell book of great repute.

description: A soot-stained book bound in rough hide
id-description: A spell book of great repute.

description: A slim silver-edged book with mirrored trim
id-description: A spell book of great repute.

description: A thick tome bound in cracked brown leather
id-description: High level spell book

description: A heavy black book with a shadowed cover
id-description: High level spell book

description: A richly bound book of green and gold
id-description: High level spell book

description: A sky-blue book edged in silver leaf
id-description: High level spell book

description: A heavy green leather book with an embossed tree emblem
id-description: Standard book of earth based spells

description: A heavy blue book with a deep shifting cover
id-description: Standard book of water based spells

description: A heavy amber book with a golden sun cover
id-description: Standard book of air based spells

description: A blood leather book with shifting mystic symbols
id-description: Standard book of fire based spells

description: A dull silver coin stamped with a circular motif
id-description: A contract coin. Used to pay a debt of service.

description: A small engraved brass token
id-description: Staff token carried by Ommedon's fortress staff.

description: A dark stone token carved with twisting symbols
id-description: Place upon a corpse's eye to prevent it from rising as undead.

description: A silver coin engraved with a mark of luck
id-description: Toss before testing luck. Heads roll 1 dice only, tails LUCK-1 then roll normally.

description: A worn copper coin stamped with strange markings
id-description: Greatly effects all financial transactions
use-message: You have picked up a cursed coin…

description: A flat wooden coin etched with a woman's profile
id-description: A worn wooden token. Will offer safe passage through the Forest between the Realms.

description: A small carved token depicting a painted green spring bud
id-description: Roughly carved but full of character, the little green bug sits raised upon the token.

description: A flat wooden token carved with a salmon motif painted blue
id-description: Its flat body is etched with simple lines suggesting scales and fins, a humble tribute to a river's bounty.

description: A small wooden token depicting a painted yellow bird
id-description: The token shows tiny swallow perched amongst a flowering sprig.

description: A painted red token etched with the likeness of a phoenix in flight
id-description: Painted in mottled reds and oranges, the pheonix seems ready to take flight from the token.

description: A single-use coin stamped with a bold numeral
id-description: Can be used once to pay for any item of any value.

description: A pair of sturdy leather riding boots
id-description: Magically enhanced to ensure sure footing. Effects SKILL by 1 point.

description: A pair of tall boots of marsh-stained leather
id-description: Allows silent un-trackable travel through muddy terrain.

description: A brass monocle with an adjustable screw frame
id-description: Reveals the magical properties of an item. It cannot reveal curses.

description: A pair of spectacles with faintly glowing lenses
id-description: Magical items glow faintly when viewed through these glasses.

description: Steel gauntlets engraved with heraldic lions
id-description: Magically blessed item, gifting the bearer with increase skill. Effects SKILL by 2 points.

description: Fitted leather gloves with reinforced knuckles
id-description: Magically enhanced to ensure focused movement. Effects SKILL by 1 point.

description: A wide-brimmed felt hat with a slouched crown
id-description: Enchanted to bring the wearer luck. Effects LUCK by 2 points.

description: More of a fashionable statement hat then a helm
id-description: Allows the wearer high mental focus.

description: A rounded leather helmet reinforced with studs
id-description: Thick leather panels are reinforced by rows of dull metal studs, offering modest protection in a fight.

description: A slender crystal quill with a faceted, translucent shaft
id-description: Shapes the bearer's Skill and Magica abilities. Effects skill by 1 point and magic by 2 points.

description: A slender crystal quill with a pale blue crystalline tip
id-description: Empowers Magical ability in subtle ways. Effects MAGIC by 2 points.

description: A narrow glass flask filled with swirling green liquid
id-description: Stirs the currents of Skill and Magical ability. Effects SKILL by 1 point and MAGIC by 2 points.

description: A squat alchemical flask sealed with wax and twine
id-description: Reshapes the wielder's Magical ability. Effects MAGIC by 2 points.

description: A small silver acorn with etched cap and stem, plucked from Antiquity
id-description: Highly magical item which can reach into the future.

description: A small silver acorn plucked from lowest branches of the silver tree
id-description: Ancient and highly magical item which weaves into the holder's skill. Effects SKILL by 3 points.

description: A small silver acorn plucked from middle branches of the silver tree
id-description: Ancient and highly magical item which weaves into the holder's stamina. Effects STAMINA by 3 points.

description: A small silver acorn plucked from highest branches of the silver tree
id-description: Ancient and highly magical item which weaves into the holder's magic. Effects MAGIC by 3 points.

description: A heavy cast iron weight
id-description: A balancing  weight for heavy mechanical machinery.

description: A cracked leather skin inked with jagged, scribbled lines
id-description: Age has split the leather along its folds, yet the sharp jagged lines still appear clear on the page.

description: A deep red rose with metallic-edged petals
id-description: Powerful sedative against dragons. Slight effect on humans. Effects SKILL by 1 points.

description: A clear bottle containing pale swirling spirits
id-description: Within the glass swirl faint pale wisps that drift lazily, as though restless spirits are trapped inside.

description: A dented iron lantern with cracked glass panes
id-description: Its metal frame is battered from hard use, and the lantern's fractured panes scatter light unevenly.

description: A worn leather backpack with brass buckles
id-description: Magically enhanced bag of holding, increases owners inventory capacity by 3.

description: A curved horn bound with bronze bands
id-description: A magical horn tuned to the ear of dragons.

description: A curved iron horseshoe polished to a shine
id-description: The curved iron shines from constant polishing, said by some to bring luck to stables and travelers.

description: A stitched cloth insignia bearing a star in a shield
id-description: Threaded carefully with thick stitching, the cloth badge displays the sigil of the the local malitia.

description: A jagged shard of stone streaked with yellow veins
id-description: When equipped, stun enemies in combat to allow escape without penalty

description: A smooth rune-stone etched with a crescent sigil
id-description: Offers the user one guaranteed luck roll.

description: A heavy stone disc carved with a doorway symbol
id-description: If thrown in battle wil open a doorway to the fae relm and summon a fairy to fight along side you.
use-message: You toss the stone, it explodes ripping a portal in the sky above you.

description: A flat rune-stone etched with a burst pattern
id-description: Explodes with light when around a life threatening trap.

description: A circular lens set in a frame of black iron
id-description: Glass eye. Place in the socket of a skull or corpse to see their last moments.

description: A faceted lens mounted in a slender silver ring
id-description: Break during combat to release a shower of dazzling stars dazing enemies. Can backfire.
use-message: A shower of brilliant dazzling stars explode into the air…

description: A thin veil of pale white gauze with frosted trim
id-description: Allows clear sight in blizzard conditions.

description: A small convex lens set in a brass frame
id-description: Place on a dragon's eye to cause instant sleep.

description: A plain carved bone whistle
id-description: Summons Aragh against Sandmurks.

description: A leather pouch filled with smooth clay marbles
id-description: The pouch rattles softly when moved, the clay spheres worn smooth by countless games and idle tosses.

description: A glazed ceramic whistle painted sky blue
id-description: When blown, the small whistle gives a clear birdlike note that carries surprisingly far in open air.

description: A simple clay flask sealed with cork
id-description: Fired in a rough kiln, the flask's clay surface bears faint fingerprints from the potter who shaped it.

description: A pair of smooth oval stones wrapped in cloth
id-description: Magical infused with everlasting low burning embers.

description: A squat clay pot coated in black pitch
id-description: Black pitch seals the porous clay beneath, giving the pot a tar-dark sheen and a faint resin scent.

description: A painted wooden soldier with a chipped helm
id-description: Bright paint once covered the toy soldier, though its chipped helm reveals the pale wood beneath.

description: A small cube carved with shifting symbols
id-description: Each face of the cube bears unfamiliar symbols that seem to shift subtly when viewed too long.

description: A leather pouch of small iron jacks
id-description: The pouch jingles faintly as the iron jacks tumble together, each bent prong catching the light.

description: A bright spinning paper windmill
id-description: The colours blur into one as the windmill spins in the wind.

description: A small spark spitting painted dragon
id-description: Magically infused with the tiniest amount of dragon fire.

description: A small pouch containing six carved bone dice
id-description: Six small dice carved from bone show uneven pips, their surfaces yellowed from years of play.

description: A brass compass with a glass-covered face
id-description: The compass needle trembles slightly before settling, always eager to point toward distant horizons.

description: A long iron key with a square-cut bow
id-description: Forged from a single bar, the long key's square bow suggests it once opened something heavy and old.

description: A clear glass bottle with a narrow neck
id-description: The bottle's thin glass walls distort the light, giving whatever it holds a strangely magnified look.

description: A small silver box lined in green velvet
id-description: Place bone inside to call upon the spirit of the long dead.

description: A sealed wooden parcel bound in twine
id-description: A box containing magical items. Contents unclear.

description: A pouch of pale blue stone orbs
id-description: Magically enchanted to remain cold to the touch.

description: A red glass orb swirling with dark mist
id-description: If thrown in battle it will instantly kill any opponent but at a significant cost to the user.
use-message: Black fire explodes from the orb as it shatters…

description: A green glass orb flecked with gold light
id-description: Throw in battle with random, but significant, effect.
use-message: The cloud of whimsy has settled…
bonus-against: The orb shatters. You are engulfed in a cloud of whimsy…

bonus_vs: the orb shatters. you are engulfed in a cloud of whimsy…

description: A cloudy jar packed with preserved toad eyes
id-description: Suspended in cloudy fluid, the pale toad eyes drift slowly whenever the jar is disturbed.

description: A glass orb filled with purple swirling mist and stars
id-description: An interesting object even if its use is not immediately clear.

description: A small glass phial filled with green powder
id-description: The fine green powder clings to the inside of the phial like dust shaken from crushed leaves.

description: A smooth grey stone etched with spiral marks
id-description: Appears to be an ancient  key of sorts.

description: A plain wooden box with iron hinges
id-description: Open to become imbued with the dexterity of another.
use-message: The box releases a choking gas, before bursting into flames and scorching your hands. Lose 2 SKILL and 2 STAMINA.

description: A thick stick of white chalk bound in twine
id-description: A chalk that can be used to draw a door where one doesn't exist

item: The Map of the Forest Deep
description: A detailed parchment map inked in deep green
id-description: Carefully drawn rivers and forests wind across the parchment in rich green ink still vivid with age.

description: A tall iron lantern painted matte black
id-description: A lantern that makes shadows unnaturally long

description: A square of pale cloth that glows like moonlight
id-description: A cloth patch sewn from moonlight.

description: A clear lens framed in brushed silver
id-description: Enchanted to show hidden text on a page.

description: A rough stone veined with dark clustered pits
id-description: Dark clustered pits pepper the rough stone's surface, like tiny shadows trapped within the rock.

description: A smooth white stone carved with a straight line
id-description: The white stone is cool and perfectly smooth, its single straight carving cut with patient precision.

description: A box of coloured chalk sticks wrapped in paper
id-description: Each chalk stick leaves bright dusty marks, their colors bold enough to show even on dark stone.

description: A small dense pebble that clings to iron
id-description: Though small and plain, the pebble grips stubbornly to iron as if drawn by an unseen pull.

description: A stoppered vial of thick dark red blood
id-description: The thick red liquid inside moves slowly when tilted, leaving dark streaks along the glass.

description: A bundle of flint-tipped arrow heads
id-description: Each arrow head is chipped from flint with careful strikes, their edges still wickedly sharp.

description: A lump of hard cheese
id-description: It looks just about edible.

description: A pouch of jagged translucent stone splinters
id-description: Twelve stones. Each will absorb the damage from one special attack when equipped.

description: A small velvet pouch filled with cut diamonds
id-description: The velvet pouch is surprisingly heavy, the diamonds inside catching stray light in sharp flashes.

description: A length of iron chain with sky-blue links
id-description: If snapped, the chain will force creatures in flight to the ground.

description: A single iridescent dragon scale petal
id-description: Absorbs dragon fire. One blast per petal  (3 collected)

description: A curtain of deep violet dusk cloud
id-description: Masks the users movements for one combat. Enemies will find it harder to target you.
use-message: A veil of dusky purple envelopes you. You can see clearly through it, but your movements become masked to your enemies reducing their SKILL by 1

description: A veil of pale moonlit mist
id-description: Masks the users movements for one combat. Enemies will find it harder to target you.
use-message: A veil of hazy moonlight envelopes you. You can see clearly through it, but your movements become masked to your enemies reducing their SKILL by 1

description: A drifting haze of dappled golden light
id-description: Masks the users movements for one combat. Enemies will find it harder to target you.
use-message: A veil of dappled sunlight envelopes you. You can see clearly through it, but your movements become masked to your enemies reducing their SKILL by 1

description: Twin blazing suns burning in mirrored arcs
id-description: Releases blinding damage to enemies, while significantly increasing your strength.
use-message: A blinding light seers your enemies reducing their SKILL, while empowering you and doubling your ATTACK strength.

description: A cascade of white starlight falling from above
id-description: Releases blinding damage to enemies, while significantly increasing your strength.
use-message: A blinding light seers your enemies reducing their SKILL, while empowering you and doubling your ATTACK strength.

description: A twisting column of emerald-green flame
id-description: Releases burning damage to enemies, while significantly increasing your strength.
use-message: A howling green flame seers your enemies reducing their SKILL, while empowering you and doubling your ATTACK strength.

description: A curved horn with ridged ivory surface
id-description: If used in combat grants the user massive damage attacks on the roll of a double.
use-message: You run the horn down the length of your weapon imbuing it with the power to inflict massive damage on a sweeping blow.

description: A hooked claw, dark and sharply curved
id-description: If used in combat grants the user massive damage attacks on the roll of a double.
use-message: You run the claw down the length of your weapon imbuing it with the power to inflict massive damage on a sweeping blow.

description: A long feather streaked in muted browns
id-description: If used in combat grants the user massive damage attacks on the roll of a double.
use-message: You run the feather down the length of your weapon imbuing it with the power to inflict massive damage on a sweeping blow.

description: A clump of dark red moss with thick strands
id-description: A rare but naturally occurring item with healing properties. STAMINA +4.
use-message: You apply the moss to your wounds. It works in fast soothing waves, offering deep healing.  Gain 4 SATMINA.

description: A swirling ribbon of crimson mist
id-description: A rare but naturally occurring item with healing properties. STAMINA +4.
use-message: You inhale the mist. It works in fast soothing waves, offering deep healing.  Gain 4 SATMINA.

description: A small pouch of fine red powder
id-description: A rare but naturally occurring item with healing properties. STAMINA +4.
use-message: You sprinkle the dust on your wounds. It works in fast soothing waves, offering deep healing.  Gain 4 SATMINA.

description: A stoppered vial filled with deep scarlet blood
id-description: Increases speed for one combat, allowing the user two attacks per round. Can not be combined with item or potion use.
use-message: You smear the blood across your face. The world blurs as you find you can now move with double speed.

description: A single large feather in mottled grey
id-description: Increases speed for one combat, allowing the user two attacks per round. Can not be combined with item or potion use.
use-message: You rub the feather across your face. The world blurs as you find you can now move with double speed.

description: A thick patch of coarse dark fur
id-description: Increases speed for one combat, allowing the user two attacks per round. Can not be combined with item or potion use.
use-message: You rub the small fur patch across your face. The world blurs as you find you can now move with double speed.

description: A string of large curved ivory teeth
id-description: Rare potion ingredient.

description: A vial of thick dark maroon blood
id-description: Mix with Ogre blood to make an explosive paste.

description: A spiralled horn banded in bronze
id-description: Used as a hair curling agent.

description: A cloudy vial filled with yellow-green bile
id-description: A magical acidic venom used widely in potion making.

description: A bundle of small pale bones tied with cord
id-description: Used by seers to foresee future events.

description: A leather saddle bag stitched with golden thread
id-description: Increases inventory capacity by 10.

description: A long feather streaked in pale gold
id-description: Soft and long, the feather glimmers faintly with streaks of pale gold along its delicate barbs.

description: A pouch of sharp uneven teeth
id-description: The teeth vary in size and shape, suggesting they were gathered from many different beasts.

description: A sack of mixed grains and dried feed
id-description: The sack smells faintly of fields and barns, its mixture of grains meant to feed hardy animals.

description: A broad wooden paddle with worn edges
id-description: Its broad wooden blade is worn smooth from years of pushing against water and river currents.

description: A weighted fishing net with knotted cords
id-description: Knotted cords hold small lead weights that help the net sink quickly when cast wide.

description: A long iron spike tapering to a sharp point
id-description: The spike narrows to a brutal point, clearly made for driving through wood or armor alike.

description: A small glass bottle of deep black ink
id-description: Dark ink coats the bottle's interior neck, evidence of many careful dips of a quill.

description: A wooden case of coloured face paints
id-description: Inside the case sit neat pots of pigment, bright enough to paint bold patterns on skin.

description: A dented pewter mug with a curved handle
id-description: Scratches and dents cover the mug's surface, proof of countless drinks shared over loud tables.

description: A blazing orb swirling with red fire
id-description: Releases dragon fire when thrown. One use only.
use-message: Dragon fire erupts form the orb as it shatters inflicting damage over a wide area.

description: A slender golden flute engraved with flowing script
id-description: Puts dragons into a healing sleep.

description: A flat grey stone etched with a heart-shaped glyph
id-description: A minor ward against mind control.

description: A small carved rattle of bone and cord
id-description: Reduce an enemy to 3 STAMINA at the cost of half your STAMINA.
use-message: The rattle disovles to dust as death's touch is released…

description: A finely carved comb of polished bone
id-description: Carved from polished bone, the comb's fine teeth glide easily through even tangled hair.

description: A sturdy wooden cart wheel with iron rim
id-description: The wheel's thick spokes are solid and dependable, built to carry heavy loads over rough roads.

description: A compact steel shovel with folding handle
id-description: Though compact, the steel shovel feels sturdy, its folding handle locking firmly in place.

description: A leather roll containing slender metal picks
id-description: Wrapped in a leather roll, the slender picks are shaped for delicate work with locks.

description: A brass spyglass with sliding telescopic tube
id-description: The brass tube slides smoothly outward, bringing distant sights closer with surprising clarity.

description: A serpent-shaped pendant of coiled bronze with emerald eyes
id-description: Appears to be an ancient key of sorts.

description: A bronze amulet shaped like a single veined leaf
id-description: Imprints upon Skill and Magic alike. Effects SKILL by 1 point and MAGIC by 2 points.

description: A silver leaf-shaped amulet with finely chased details
id-description: Stirs the currents of Magic. Effects MAGIC by 2 points.

description: A delicate clay pendant etched with precise markings
id-description: Offers wearer increased health. Effects STAMINA by 5 points.

description: A yellow gem on a delicate silver chain
id-description: Enchanted to bring the wearer luck. Effects LUCK by 1 point.

description: A dark pendant etched with a scythe emblem
id-description: When worn the pendant will absorb killing blows keeping the wearer at one stamina until the end of batlle. It can only do this one.

description: A smooth stone etched with repeating geometric patterns
id-description: The etched lines repeat in precise patterns, suggesting the stone once held symbolic meaning.

description: A small pendant threaded with tightly knotted cords
id-description: Thin cords knot tightly around the pendant, forming a pattern that might hide quiet significance.

description: A carved wooden bird figurine with outstretched wings
id-description: The little bird's wings stretch proudly outward, its carved feathers rendered with simple care.

description: A parchment slip bearing a single bold written word
id-description: The lone word stands bold and deliberate, written as if meant to command attention.

description: A torn parchment marked with an incomplete sentence
id-description: The torn parchment ends abruptly, leaving its unfinished sentence hanging with uneasy mystery.

description: A sealed scroll bound with black ribbon and sigil
id-description: Black ribbon binds the scroll tightly, its wax seal pressed with a careful emblem.

description: A stoppered glass vial filled with shimmering liquid
id-description: Tiny flecks of light dance within the shimmering liquid each time the vial is moved.

description: A slim vial labeled with precise arcane script
id-description: Precise lettering marks the slim vial, the script clearly penned by a practiced arcane hand.

description: A parchment contract sealed in dark red wax
id-description: The thick red wax seal bears a firm imprint, marking the parchment as formally agreed.

description: A parchment contract marked with jagged infernal script
id-description: Jagged infernal letters crawl across the contract, their shapes harsh and unsettling to read.

description: A scorched contract bearing a blackened thumbprint
id-description: Heat has scorched the edges of the parchment, the dark thumbprint pressed deeply into it.

description: A small flask coated in slick black oil
id-description: A slick sheen of black oil coats the flask, leaving faint smudges on careless fingers.

description: A folded parchment token stamped with bathhouse seal
id-description: Stamped with an official seal, the folded token promises entry to steamy halls of rest.

description: A lacquered wooden chit marked with red ink
id-description: Red ink marks the lacquered chit with brisk strokes, likely used for counting debts or favors.

description: A cloudy vial filled with milky solution
id-description: The milky liquid inside swirls slowly, opaque enough to hide whatever might be dissolved within.

description: A small copper coin chipped along one side
id-description: Its copper edge is chipped but the worn surface still bears the faint outline of a face.

description: A bundle of dried green leaves tied with twine
id-description: Potion ingredient. Used to hide tracks.

description: A slim crystal vial filled with rose-tinted liquid
id-description: Potion ingredient. Used to hide sound.

description: A tiny corked bottle of bright red syrup, with a picture of  a strawberry on the label
id-description: Makes potions taste of strawberry

description: A dark glass vial filled with thick crimson brew
id-description: Base Potion - take no damage for 3 combat rounds

description: A narrow vial containing amber liquid
id-description: Potion Ingredient. Heightens speed for 3 combat rounds.

description: A squat jar holding a dense purple extract
id-description: Potion Ingredient. Increase strength for 3 combat rounds.

description: A clear vial of inky black essence labelled Liquorish Essence
id-description: Makes potions taste of liquorish

description: A pale blue vial with silvery sediment
id-description: Base Potion. Sure footing in any environment

description: A slim flask filled with shimmering gold liquid
id-description: Potion Ingredient. Instinctively know the right path.

description: The removed eye of a cat
id-description: Potion Ingredient. Often used for brews concering night vision.

description: A small corked bottle of cherry-red syrup labeled with a picture of a cherry
id-description: Makes potions taste of cherry

description: A bundle of wild mushrooms in earthy tones
id-description: Earthy scents rise from the bundle, the mushrooms gathered fresh from damp forest ground.

description: A pale silver vial filled with translucent liquid holding a shadowy figure
id-description: Base Potion - renders the drinker invisible.

description: A white noxious smelling paste labelled: To be Ingested
id-description: Healing paste with variable potency.
use-message: The paste warms your skin as it seeps in, slowly mending wounds and restoring a measure of lost strength.

description: A brown sludgy paste that smells suspiciously of dung, labelled: Apply as a Mask
id-description: Healing mask with variable potency.
use-message: The mask tingles across your face, its soothing herbs knitting small injuries and easing your weary body.

description: A bottle of what looks and smells like sick. Labelled as an energy drink
id-description: Healing tonic with variable potency.
use-message: The tonic spreads warmth through your chest, closing wounds and returning a steady pulse of vitality.

description: A corked glass phial swirling with stormy grey liquid
id-description: The bottled rage of a storm.
use-message: You swallow the storm. Power crackles through you as thunderous fury surges in your veins. It's a little unpleasant and gives you a bit of a headache. STAMINA -1

description: A crystal vial glowing with faint starlight
id-description: Gives the drinker the power to see invisible creatures.
use-message: Your vision sharpens strangely. If there were hidden creatures to see you feel sure you'd be able to see them now.

description: A black glass bottle sealed with silver wax
id-description: Allows the drinker to raise the long dead and have them join the battle.
use-message: Dark power answers your call. That which was once dead crawls from the earth and joins the battle... against you.

description: A pale blue vial flecked with white motes
id-description: Allows the drinker to drift safely to the ground from great heights.
use-message: Your body grows light as air. It would be useful if your were falling. As you are not it's somewhat inconvenient.

description: A deep green flask swirling with misty vapour
id-description: Allows the drinker to breathe underwater.
use-message: If underwater you could breath where others would drown, but you are on land and the potion leaves you gasping for air. Lose 2 STAMINA.

description: A golden vial tied with a crimson ribbon
id-description: Ensures the drinker good luck. LUCK + 2
use-message: A pleasant warmth settles over you. Fortune smiles-your LUCK increases by 2.

description: A broad clay bottle sealed with iron wax
id-description: Halves damage taken and significantly increases ATTACK strength.
use-message: Your body hardens and your strikes grow brutal. You take half damage and your ATTACK surges.

description: A small jar of thick brown paste
id-description: The paste clings thickly to the jar's sides, smelling faintly of herbs and bitter roots.
use-message: The bitter herbal paste burns slightly as it works, slowly knitting flesh and restoring your strength.

description: A tin of pale cream with a stamped lid
id-description: A stamped lid seals the tin tight, keeping the pale cream inside smooth and fresh.
use-message: The smooth cream cools your skin and eases your aches, bringing steady healing through its rich salve.

description: A dark glass vial swirling with shifting colours
id-description: Fully restores LUCK
use-message: A rush of confidence fills you as fate bends kindly - your LUCK is fully restored.

description: A radiant vial glowing with soft golden light
id-description: Fully restores STAMINA
use-message: A deep vitality surges through your body, restoring every drop of your lost STAMINA.

description: A pale green bottle sealed with leaf-shaped wax
id-description: Fully restores MAGIC
use-message: Arcane energy floods your mind, replenishing your MAGIC to its full strength.

description: A dark red brew marbled with black streaks
id-description: Ensures the user takes no damage for 3 combat rounds, while also increasing their speed.
use-message: A shimmering barrier surrounds you for three rounds, preventing harm while halving any damage that strikes.

description: A crimson brew swirling with heavy green tones
id-description: Ensures the user takes no damage for 3 combat rounds, while also increasing their strength
use-message: A glowing ward shields you from harm for three rounds while raw strength courses through your limbs.

description: A deep red potion streaked with inky black
id-description: Ensures the user takes no damage for 3 combat rounds. Tastes of liquorish
use-message: A sweet liquorice taste fills your mouth as a protective force prevents all damage for three rounds.

description: A pale amber potion flecked with silver
id-description: Ensures sure footing on any ground and will sometimes give insight into the safest path.
use-message: Your footing becomes perfectly sure and your instincts attune toward the path ahead.

description: A greenish brew sparkling with sharp light
id-description: Ensures sure footing on any ground and allows the drinker to see in the dark.
use-message: Your steps grow steady and certain, while shadows brighten as your eyes gain the power to see in darkness.

description: A rosy potion threaded with darker veins
id-description: Ensures sure footing on any ground. Tastes of cherry
use-message: DELICIOUS! A faint cherry taste lingers as your footing becomes flawless across even the most treacherous ground.

description: A pale silver potion tinted faintly green
id-description: Renders the drinker invisible from creatures in flight while also hiding their tracks.
use-message: Your form fades from sight to those above you and even the marks of your passing vanish from the ground.

description: A translucent brew with swirling purple ribbons
id-description: Renders the drinker invisible from creatures in flight while also masking any sound they make.
use-message: You slip from view entirely from creatures in flight, and even your footsteps and breathing make no sound.

description: A pink-tinged potion flecked with tiny red sparks
id-description: Renders the drinker invisible from creatures in flight. Tastes of strawberry.
use-message: Your body fades from sight to those above you while a sweet hint of strawberry lingering on your tongue. Yum.

description: A round pie sealed with a flaky crust
id-description: The golden crust is crimped neatly around the edge, sealing warm filling within.
use-message: Warmth spreads through you as the rich pie restores your strength and lifts your weary spirit.

description: A silver ring set with a small crimson gem
id-description: Revives the wearer with half their maximum stamina if they are killed during combat. One use only.
use-message: Death loses its grip. If you fall in battle, this charm will revive you with half your stamina once.

description: A thin gold ring etched with intertwining lines
id-description: Allows the wearer to reroll any non combat roll.
use-message: The ring hums with power, granting rerolls when fortune turns against you.

description: A gold ring set with a pale blue gem
id-description: Empowers Magical ability in subtle ways. Effects MAGIC by 2 points.
use-message: Subtle arcane strength flows into you, raising your MAGIC by 2.

description: A simple brass ring polished bright
id-description: Enchanted to bring the wearer luck. Effects LUCK by 2 points.
use-message: A quiet charm of fortune settles around you, increasing your LUCK by 2.

description: A dark ring that seems to blur at the edges
id-description: Allows the wearer's shadow to fight along side them.
use-message: Your shadow twists free and rises beside you, ready to strike at your enemies in battle.

description: A black iron ring engraved with a scythe
id-description: Infuses the wearer with the luck of the reaper.
use-message: A cold thrill runs through you as the reaper's strange luck settles upon your fate.

description: A pale ivory ring carved with peaceful figures
id-description: Infuses the wearer with the touch of eternal peace.
use-message: A calm stillness fills your body as the touch of eternal peace settles over you.

description: A heavy stone ring etched with a goddess sigil
id-description: Infuses the wearer with power of the grave of the goddess.
use-message: Grave-born power stirs within you, echoing the ancient strength of the goddess.

description: A hollow silver ring with a thin band with a purple gem
id-description: Ensures that the wearer leaves no tracks on natural terrain.
use-message: Your passing leaves no trace-no tracks remain behind you on natural ground.

description: A thin silver ring with a narrow band and a clear gem
id-description: Allows the wearer to breath underwater.
use-message: You breathe easily beneath the water, moving as freely as if you stood on land.

description: A heavy gold ring with a green gem
id-description: Gives the wearer power over grubs and worms.
use-message: A quiet command enters your voice and presence, granting you power over nearby animals.

description: Aged parchment sheet with frayed edges, yellowed fibers, and faint brown stains spreading like old rain marks
id-description: Restore a small amount of lost health. STAMINA +3

description: Thin ivory paper with deckled edges, softly curled corners, and a subtle marbled grain across the surface
id-description: Blend seamlessly into a crowd, becoming difficult to notice.
use-message: You are just another face in the crowd. Completely inconspicuous.

description: Cracked parchment with darkened edges, wrinkled texture, and faint soot smudges near the margins
id-description: Fire a jet of firey snot from your nostril.
use-message: OW! That really, REALLY hurt. Lose 2 STAMINA.

description: Smooth pale vellum with a soft sheen, trimmed square edges, and faint natural vein patterns
id-description: Create a convincing but non-functional copy of one item.

description: Rough handmade paper with uneven thickness, visible fibers, and slightly torn feathered edges
id-description: Summon steady rainfall over a local area.
use-message: A slow and steady rain begins where you stand.

description: Charred parchment fragment with blackened corners, ash specks, and brittle curling along the sides
id-description: Fully restore lost LUCK.
use-message: Your LUCK has been fully restored.

description: Cream-colored scroll paper with tightly rolled edges and fine horizontal press lines
id-description: Fully restore lost MAGIC.
use-message: Your MAGIC has been fully restored.

description: Weathered parchment with water stains blooming outward and a mottled tan and amber surface
id-description: Fall into a deep, fitful magical sleep; from which you cannot awake until the spell ends.
use-message: You awake from a fitful sleep, feeling unrested and weakened.

description: Delicate rice paper sheet, nearly translucent, with fine threads of fiber visible throughout
id-description: Open one locked door or simple lock without the need for a key.

description: Thick parchment with a leathery texture, heavy creases, and darkened folds from repeated handling
id-description: Reveal the properties and magical nature of one item.
use-message: You can now view your item's full information in the the inventory.

description: Faded ivory paper with scattered ink blots and softly curled corners from age
id-description: Repair one broken or damaged non-magical item.
use-message: You have successfully cast Tinker Talent…

description: Ragged parchment page with uneven cuts and several small holes where the fibers thinned
id-description: Restore half of you missing LUCK (rounded up).
use-message: Half your missing LUCK has been restored.

description: Smooth bleached paper with a faint shimmering grain and perfectly straight edges
id-description: Restore half of your missing STAMINA (rounded up).
use-message: Half your missing STAMINA has been restored.

description: Dusty tan parchment with streaks of discoloration and rough, fibrous tears along one side
id-description: Restore half of your missing SKILL (rounded up).
use-message: Half your missing SKILL has been restored.

description: Pale gray paper with a chalky matte finish and subtle ripples across the surface
id-description: Restore half of missing MAGIC (rounded up).
use-message: Half your missing MAGIC has been restored.

description: Golden parchment sheet with darkened edges and tiny specks of darker pigment scattered across it
id-description: Compel another to speak a truth.
use-message: Those you are speaking with will only tell the truth.

description: Crumpled parchment with deep fold lines and flattened creases radiating across the page
id-description: Reveal and speak the true name of another.
use-message: You speak the true name of another.

description: Thin brittle paper with spiderweb cracks and faded stains clustered near the corners
id-description: Create an illusory duplicate of yourself that mimics your movements.
use-message: You create a passable clone of yourself. It mirrors your movements while active.

description: Cream parchment with delicate deckled edges and a soft cloudy texture throughout
id-description: Reroll one non combat die set and accept the new result.

description: Heavy tan parchment with a rough grain and slight warping along the outer edges
id-description: Reduce the inventory cost of one large carried item to 1 slot.
use-message: You have successfully cast the Feather of Atlas…

description: Weather-beaten scroll paper with wind-torn corners and faint dusty smudges across the surface
id-description: Travel into the realm of the dead.
use-message: You slip into the realm of death.

description: Soft ivory sheet with subtle pressed fibers forming faint swirling patterns
id-description: Detect whether an item is under a curse.
use-message: You have successfully cast Tug the Black Thread…

description: Rough parchment scrap with jagged edges and dark oil-like blotches near the center
id-description: Add a hard scale skin to non macial armour, helmets or shields increasing their durability.
use-message: You have successfully cast Scale Skin…

description: Smooth antique paper with warm amber tones and gentle fading toward the edges
id-description: Restore a moderate amount of lost health STAMINA +6

description: Crinkled parchment with a dry papery texture and thin fracture lines spreading outward
id-description: Magically summon a friendly snake to follow you.
use-message: Sam has joined you, and will remain until killed.

description: Light beige vellum with faint natural mottling and softly rounded corners
id-description: Remove a curse from a single item.
use-message: The Witch Knot Sundered has sucessfully cast…

description: Darkened parchment with smoky stains and uneven discoloration across the sheet
id-description: Roll one additional die and discard any one die of your choice.

description: Thin aged paper with fraying fibers and delicate translucent patches where it has worn
id-description: Purify enough water for safe drinking for several people.
use-message: If it was water, it is now safe to drink.

description: Heavy cream parchment with broad creases and a faint leathery grain
id-description: Transform one non-magical item into its equivalent value in gold.
use-message: You cast The Value Within successfully.

description: Soft textured paper with uneven pulp specks and slightly scalloped edges
id-description: Transform one non-magical item into nourishing food.
use-message: You item has been converted into food.

description: Yellowed parchment with clustered brown speckles and gently curling sides
id-description: Summon an elaborate and stylish hat of impressive quality.

description: Rough fibrous sheet with thick visible strands pressed into the paper surface
id-description: Ignore penalties and harmful effects caused by storms.
use-message: You are immune to the effects of the storm.

description: Ivory paper with a faint pearl-like sheen and crisp clean edges
id-description: Move across marshland without sinking or movement penalties.
use-message: You can traverse the mashland as if on dry land.

description: Dust-speckled parchment with pale stains and a rough textured grain
id-description: Bewitch a troll, causing it to follow and obey simple commands for a short time.
use-message: The spell has no effect. Perhaps this creature is not all troll.

description: Soft tan paper with subtle rippling and faint water damage marks
id-description: Create a perfect working copy of one simple key.
use-message: You have successfully cast Shadow of the Locksmith…

description: Fine vellum sheet with smooth grain and delicate natural discoloration
id-description: Create a dazzling and harmless magical light display.
use-message: Wizz, Bang, Pow! Golly. That was pretty.

description: Cracked parchment with brittle curling edges and pale dusty streaks
id-description: Exhale a cloud of pepper.
use-message: You exhale a cloud of peppery breath. It's a rather unpleasant experience really.

description: Thin handmade sheet with visible pulp flecks and rough irregular sides
id-description: Breathe underwater for a limited duration.
use-message: If underwater you could breath where others would drown, but you are on land and this spell leaves you gasping for air. Lose 2 STAMINA.

description: Golden tan parchment with deep fold lines and darker burnished edges
id-description: Transform your hairstyle into something breath taking.
use-message: Well that is one magnificent hair cut. So good in fact, you decide to never wear a hat again.

description: Translucent pale sheet with delicate fibers crisscrossing beneath the surface
id-description: Summon a whale to your location.

description: Aged parchment with soft wrinkles and scattered ash-gray smudges
id-description: Leap as though you have the legs of a frog.
use-message: You are stuck leaping like a frog until the spell wears off. Lose 1 LUCK.

description: Heavy parchment with thick fibrous grain and blunt uneven edges
id-description: Speak and understand any spoken language for a short time.
use-message: You can now speak and undertand any language until the spell wears off.

description: Light cream paper with faint pressed lines and soft feathered borders
id-description: Turn you legs to jelly
use-message: While delicious, jelly is not the right material for legs. They collapse under you weight. You retire to the home for wizards who used to have legs but turned them into jelly. Your quest is over.

description: Weathered tan sheet with water rings and faint streaks running downward
id-description: Fully restore STAMINA, SKILL, LUCK, and MAGIC.
use-message: All of your stats have been restored to their maximum,

description: Old scroll paper with tightly curved ends and subtle horizontal creases
id-description: Move the sun and stars in the heavens above.
use-message: Seriously! You think you can move the suns and stars with a spell. Get over yourself.

description: Soft ivory parchment with gentle ripples and slightly darkened corners
id-description: Perfectly mimic the cry of a wild animal.
use-message: You summon your inner animal and…

description: Fragile yellowed sheet with tiny holes and thinning translucent patches
id-description: Restore a large amount of lost health. STAMINA +10
use-message: You have been healed a great amount.

description: Warm beige paper with faint marbling and smooth worn edges
id-description: Double the amount of gold currently carried.

description: A wooden shield with a studded iron rim
id-description: Wooden boards form the shield's face, while its iron rim protects against splintering blows.

description: A round shield of layered wood hand decorated
id-description: Rough reinforced layered wood, making the shield heavier but far sturdier.

description: A round bronze shield painted with planetary rings
id-description: Repels dark sorcery.

description: A polished black wand veined with faint silver lines
id-description: Disturbs the balance Magic. Effects MAGIC by 2 points.

description: A slender wand capped with a black gem
id-description: Magically blessed to ensures the holder will always have 1 MAGIC.

description: A twisted wooden rod knotted with vines
id-description: A rare magical wood used in wand and staff craft. Increases holder MAGIC limit by one.

description: A polished wooden staff capped with pale crystal
id-description: A rare magical staff. Increases holder MAGIC limit by two.

description: A dark staff wrapped in deep blue cord
id-description: A rare magical staff. Increases holder MAGIC limit by three.

description: A heavy oak staff carved with earthen runes
id-description: A rare magical staff. Increases holder MAGIC limit by four.

description: A straight ash staff etched with leaf patterns
id-description: A rare magical staff. Increases holder MAGIC limit by five.

description: A tall green-stained staff tipped with amber
id-description: A rare highly magical staff. Allows user limitless Magic.

description: A tall staff topped with a glowing crystal orb
id-description: Magically blessed to ensures the bearer always has at least 2 MAGIC.

description: A jagged shard of pale blue crystal
id-description: A rare magical crystal used in wand and staff craft. Increases holder LUCK limit by one.

description: A smooth crystal shard faintly glowing
id-description: A rare LUCK wand. Increases holder LUCK limit by two.

description: A dark shard flecked with tiny star-like specks
id-description: A rare LUCK wand. Increases holder LUCK limit by three.

description: A faceted shard etched with converging lines
id-description: A rare LUCK wand. Increases holder LUCK limit by four.

description: A radiant shard shimmering with celestial hues
id-description: A rare LUCK wand. Increases holder LUCK limit by five.

description: A clear shard swirling with cosmic patterns
id-description: A rare highly lucky wand. The holder is ensured incredible luck.

description: A bright sky-blue crystal shard
id-description: Wood found in yellow realm. Can be used as a staff.

description: A sky-blue shard etched with blessing marks
id-description: A rare STAMINA crystal used in wand and staff craft. Increases holder STAMINA limit by one.

description: A sunlit shard glowing warm gold
id-description: A rare STAMINA wand. Increases holder STAMINA limit by two.

description: A sharpened shard with honed crystal edges
id-description: A rare STAMINA wand. Increases holder STAMINA limit by three.

description: A large flawless shard of brilliant clarity
id-description: A rare STAMINA wand. Increases holder STAMINA limit by four.

description: A masterfully cut shard of sky-tinted crystal
id-description: A rare STAMINA wand. Increases holder STAMINA limit by five.

description: Common full length wooden staff
id-description: Allows the holder to cast magic

description: A shirt of interlinked steel rings
id-description: Thousands of interlocking steel rings form a flexible shirt that glints faintly in the light.

description: A stained leather apron with heavy stitching
id-description: Magically enhanced to ensure nimble movement. Effects SKILL by 1 point.

description: The sheared fleece of a Graffle Cut
id-description: Enchanted to increase the wearer's maximum luck allowance.

description: The sheared fleece of a Graffle Cut
id-description: Enchanted to increase the wearer's maximum magic allowance.

description: The sheared fleece of a Graffle Cut
id-description: Enchanted to increase the wearer's maximum stamina allowance.

description: A heavy pelt with coarse grey fur
id-description: Gives the wearer strength in blizzard conditions.

description: A dark robe that swallows surrounding light
id-description: Grants the wearer near invisibility in dim light.

description: A mottled green coat patterned like forest leaves
id-description: Renders the wearer virtually invisible while on natural terrain.

description: A broad longsword with a lion-crested pommel
id-description: Magically blessed item, gifting the bearer with increase skill. Effects SKILL by 2 points.

description: A short dagger with a notched, rust-flecked blade
id-description: The dagger's blade bears small notches from hard use, its edge still keen despite the wear.

description: A plain steel longsword with leather-wrapped grip
id-description: Balanced and reliable, the plain longsword shows careful forging meant for steady hands in battle.

description: A broad sword with a cross-shaped guard
id-description: Original Sword used in the battle of the Withered Arch. Blesses user with steadiness during battle. Effects skill by 1 point.

description: A curved sickle with a hooked iron blade
id-description: Magically enhance to give the bearer greater strength. Effects ATTACK by on point.

description: A jagged dagger with a chipped steel blade
id-description: Well used, but of good quality.

description: A heavy barbed club wrapped in leather strips
id-description: Effective against worms and crawlers.

description: Common short sword
id-description: suitable for combat

description: A magnificent hair and beard combo
id-description: With a hair and beard combo this good, you will never wear a hat again.

description: A pair of fabulous stripy dancing slippers
id-description: Blesses the wearer with incredible dancing prowess at the cost of 2 stamina.

description: A heavy barbed flaming battle axe
id-description: It's on fire. So cool. Effective against worms and crawlers.

description: A heavily embroidered yet weightless wizards robe
id-description: A godly robe offering the wearer great power.

description: A nice looking biscuit
id-description: Soft yet crumbly, with oats and berries throughout.
use-message: Super yum! The cookie restores your strength and tastes scrumptious.

description: A volatile dark red paste
id-description: Can be thrown in combat to cause burning damage to all enemies.
use-message: Paste bursts from the ceramic container coating the enemy in burning paste.

description: Ivory paper with a faint pearl-like sheen and crisp clean edges
id-description: Move through swampland completely unimpeded and invisible to native life forms.
use-message: You can traverse the swampland as if on dry land. And no swamp creature will harm you.

description: Yellowed parchment with clustered brown speckles and gently curling sides
id-description: Summon magical bread that will never run out.
use-message: You now have a right tasty looking roll.

description: A warm crusty lavishly buttered roll
id-description: A nourishing magical bread that will never run out no matter how much you eat.
use-message: Delicious. You could have some more. There's plenty left.

description: Light beige vellum with faint natural mottling and softly rounded corners
id-description: Remove a curse from a single item.
use-message: The Curse Crusher has sucessfully cast…

description: A heavy green tunic made from troll hide
id-description: A magical tunic that offers the wearer great strength at the cost of STAMINA.

description: A bag of acidic mushroom that burn to touch. Labelled as a healing aid
id-description: Healing mushrooms with variable potency.
use-message: The mushrooms warmth spreads through your chest, closing wounds and returning a steady pulse of vitality.

description: A sturdy brass pocket-watch with a cracked leather chain
id-description: Keeps reasonably accurate time despite its age and rough condition

description: A small sandglass fitted inside a wooden travelling case
id-description: Measures short intervals reliably during travel or watch duty

description: A compass set into a silver casing scratched by age
id-description: Helps maintain direction even in poor weather or unfamiliar terrain

description: A bundle of clockwork springs and fine steel wire useful for repairs or traps
id-description: Contains enough material for several delicate repairs or improvised mechanisms

description: A rolled parchment star map showing the northern skies
id-description: Includes seasonal star positions useful for navigation at night

description: A brass pocket spyglass with worn black leather grips
id-description: Extends distant landmarks into clear view for scouting or navigation

description: A measuring compass for plotting distances on maps
id-description: Allows accurate transfer of distances between maps and charts

description: A heavy oilskin cloak embroidered with faded constellations
id-description: Provides strong protection against rain, sea spray, and cold winds

description: A bone whistle with a shrill, piercing tone
id-description: Sharp enough to alert companions or frighten animals at close range

description: A tightly stretched hand drum small enough to strap to a backpack
id-description: Produces a steady rhythm suitable for marching signals or performances

description: A leather case containing spare lute strings and thin wire
id-description: Contains replacement strings and wire for quick field repairs

description: A polished hunting horn capable of carrying sound over long distances
id-description: Carries loud signals across valleys, forests, or open ground

description: A bundle of slow-burning travel candles wrapped in cloth
id-description: Burns slowly enough to provide light through long stretches of travel

description: A brass lantern with thick horn windows to protect the flame
id-description: Shields its flame well against wind and rough weather conditions

description: A small pot of pine-scented sealing wax with a wooden stamp
id-description: Useful for sealing letters, marking documents, or securing small parcels

description: A packet of black candle-smoke powder used to darken windows or signal fires
id-description: Creates thick dark smoke useful for concealment or distant signalling

description: A compact, master crafted travel violin
id-description: Fitted with polished bone tuners and a dark wood fret board

description: A sealed pouch of rare resin and pitch
id-description: Used for preserving and repairing fine instruments

description: A detailed celestial navigation atlas
id-description: Marked with trade routes and seasonal star shifts

description: A high-grade sighting telescope
id-description: Designed for professional navigational work

description: Finely engraved precision regulator watch
id-description: Tracks minutes, seconds, and fractional time intervals

description: A ring of twelve finely cut keys
id-description: Used to open almost any high-end timepiece casing

description: Royal-grade sealing candles
id-description: Black and deep blue, each one stamped with a fine insignia

description: Refined candle essence oils
id-description: Used to scent or treat candles for long-burning ceremonial use

description: A heavy carbon ring etched with a black sigil
id-description: Infuses the wearer with the power of death's touch.
use-message: Grave-born power stirs within you as death embraces you.

description: A soot leather mantle with heavy red stitching
id-description: Magically enhanced to ensure nimble movement. Effects SKILL by 1 point.

description: A roughly wrapped ration pack
id-description: Ration pack commonly used by soldiers
use-message: It is an unsatisfactory meal, but it does still nourish you.

description: A roughly wrapped ration pack
id-description: Ration pack commonly used by soldiers
use-message: It is an unsatisfactory meal, but it does still nourish you.

description: A roughly wrapped ration pack
id-description: Ration pack commonly used by soldiers
use-message: It is an unsatisfactory meal, but it does still nourish you.

description: A roughly wrapped ration pack
id-description: Ration pack commonly used by soldiers
use-message: It is an unsatisfactory meal, but it does still nourish you.

item: Ration Pack - Mud in a Packet
description: A roughly wrapped ration pack
id-description: Ration pack commonly used by soldiers
use-message: It is an unsatisfactory meal, but it does still nourish you.

description: Small oat cakes baked with honey and a touch of nutmeg
id-description: Rustic flat cakes baked on hot stone griddles.
use-message: Soft at first, then crumbly with a warm honey sweetness, filling and nutritious.

description: Thin strips of eel smoked over alderwood through the night
id-description: River-caught eel preserved over long smoking fires.
use-message: Salty, oily, and chewy with a lingering smoky flavour, filling and nutritious.

description: Tiny pastry tarts filled with cinnamon apples and raisins
id-description: Sweet orchard apples baked in pastry with winter spice.
use-message: Crisp pastry giving way to sweet, soft fruit filling, filling and nutritious.

description: Hot chestnuts roasted in iron pans over glowing coals
id-description: Wild chestnuts gathered and cooked over open flame.
use-message: Nutty and soft with a gentle smoky warmth, filling and nutritious.

description: Salted beef strips cured for long travel and cold weather
id-description: Air-dried meat preserved with heavy salt and smoke.
use-message: Tough and savoury, needing slow chewing to soften, filling and nutritious.

description: Small folded pies stuffed with dark forest berries
id-description: Wild berries baked inside simple pastry pockets.
use-message: Sweet and tart with flaky pastry and sticky filling, filling and nutritious.

description: Soft goat cheese mixed with thyme and crushed garlic
id-description: Fresh dairy curds shaped and seasoned with herbs.
use-message: Creamy and rich with sharp herbal notes throughout, filling and nutritious.

description: Roasted walnuts and hazelnuts coated in boiled honey
id-description: Nuts toasted and bound in thickened forest honey.
use-message: Crunchy and sweet with sticky fingers after eating, filling and nutritious.

description: Twisted bread rolls baked with onion and coarse salt
id-description: Dough shaped and baked with slow-cooked onions.
use-message: Dense and filling with a savoury, buttery taste, filling and nutritious.

description: Hard-boiled eggs preserved in spiced vinegar brine
id-description: Eggs stored long-term in sharp herbal vinegar jars.
use-message: Sharp and tangy with a firm, salty bite, filling and nutritious.

description: Dried plum slices dusted with costly white sugar
id-description: Preserved plums dried and lightly sweetened.
use-message: Chewy and intensely sweet with deep fruit flavour, filling and nutritious.

description: Short pork sausages seasoned heavily with garlic and pepper
id-description: Pork encased in intestine and heavily spiced.
use-message: Juicy and smoky with bursts of strong garlic spice, filling and nutritious.

description: Fried turnip patties mixed with butter and barley flour
id-description: Root vegetables mashed and pan-fried into cakes.
use-message: Crisp outside, soft inside, earthy and satisfying, filling and nutritious.

description: Thin pear slices dried slowly with cinnamon bark
id-description: Orchard pears preserved with warming spice.
use-message: Light and chewy with gentle sweetness and spice, filling and nutritious.

description: Thick bread chunks soaked in warm honey mead
id-description: Stale bread softened in sweet fermented honey drink.
use-message: Sweet, heavy, and soft enough to melt in the mouth, filling and nutritious.

description: Freshly baked fruited buns
id-description: With a white cross across their tops
use-message: A delicious, lightly spiced bun, filling and nutritious.

description: Freshly picked apples
id-description: Red and shiny

description: A black winged deamon with firey ruby eyes
id-description: Will fight alongside you in battle

description: A polished black wand veined with faint silver lines
id-description: Disturbs the balance Magic. Effects MAGIC by 2 points.

description: A mixed collection of silver coins
id-description: Coins denominations and origin are hard to make out

description: A mixed collection of copper coins
id-description: Coins denominations and origin are hard to make out

description: A mixed collection of bronze coins
id-description: Coins denominations and origin are hard to make out

description: A dark wide ring with an eye inset in a resin dome
id-description: Summons a minor beholder to fight alongside the wearer
use-message: Your have summoned a minor beholder to fight along side you.
